creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: Squid 4.15 went EOL so we probably had to update the port. After the upgrade, I found another minor problem with Squid 5.3 reported as bug 261464. Now when I have applied a workaround PR 261464, I hoped will be able to deploy it, but your report discourages use 5.3 in production.
